methodology: Empowered-style OKRs with a small number of company objectives, linked source objectives, and explicit team ownership.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe rider, driver, and business outcomes rather than shipping output.
Key results tie customer and business KPIs together where the marketplace creates real tradeoffs.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Make the core trip feel more dependable
companyObjectives.statement: Improve reliability across booking, pickup, and support so riders and drivers both experience fewer avoidable failures.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Turn specialized mobility flows into durable growth
companyObjectives.statement: Translate stronger airport, reserve, fleet, and business experiences into better revenue quality and marketplace resilience.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Reduce avoidable trip failures in the core rider journey
objectives.objective: Improve trip conversion and repeat use by making pickup, matching, and post-trip support more predictable.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of requested trips that complete with acceptable pickup and arrival predictability.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Share of requests that become completed trips.

keyResults.target: Complete more trips without avoidable pickup or trust failures
keyResults.baseline: Peak periods and constrained pickup zones still create visible trip drop-off
keyResults.statement: Increase reliable on-time trip completion by improving request quality, rematch behavior, and rider-facing trip clarity.

executingTeams.intent: Lead rider booking, trip-state, and support improvements.

supportingTeams.intent: Improve match quality and rematch logic.
Reduce trust and support failures during trips.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Make driver earnings and compliance easier to trust
objectives.objective: Reduce avoidable driver churn by improving earnings clarity, compliance transparency, and support response.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Net earnings quality from active driving time.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Enough active, high-quality supply to meet rider demand.

keyResults.target: Improve productive earnings in focus markets
keyResults.baseline: Drivers still lose confidence when payout and dispatch behavior feel opaque
keyResults.statement: Increase driver earnings per active hour by improving dispatch quality, payout visibility, and compliance transparency.

executingTeams.intent: Lead earnings and compliance workflow improvements.

supportingTeams.intent: Improve offer quality and supply productivity.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Make airport and reserve flows meaningfully more predictable
objectives.objective: Turn high-stakes scheduled and airport travel into a stronger source of rider confidence and premium demand.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Difference between promised and actual timing.
Scheduled or reserved trips fulfilled as planned.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Healthy trip volume and price realization without harming trust.

keyResults.target: Reduce timing uncertainty in airport and reserve trips
keyResults.baseline: Constrained pickup environments still create visible timing misses
keyResults.statement: Reduce ETA error for airport and reserve journeys by tightening scheduling, zone rules, and pickup guidance.

executingTeams.intent: Lead airport and reserve flow improvements.

supportingTeams.intent: Improve constrained-zone dispatch and supply timing.
Improve reserve fulfillment from organized supply.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Grow managed business travel without weakening controls
objectives.objective: Increase business-program adoption by improving admin trust in policy, billing, and reporting.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of eligible travelers actively using the managed program.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Sustainable enterprise spend flowing through managed programs.

keyResults.target: Increase active managed travelers in current accounts
keyResults.baseline: Program adoption still stalls when policy and reporting confidence are weak
keyResults.statement: Increase business program adoption by improving policy controls, billing clarity, and reporting trust.

executingTeams.intent: Lead business and admin control improvements through shared account tooling.

supportingTeams.intent: Improve reporting and finance-grade data quality.
Keep the managed-traveler experience close to the core rider flow.
